Liu A еҠүйҳҝ
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Liu A (еҠүйҳҝ). Defeated by Liu Bei at Yi Ling. Later defeated by Zhang He. Liu A was affiliated with the Wu Kingdom.
